title: UIUX - Executive
description:
Position: UI/UX Designer

Experience: 1-3 Years

Location: Pune (On-Site)

About Amura

Amura Marketing is a next-generation Martech company that delivers end-to-end marketing and sales solutions to leading brands in India. Our approach combines design, engineering, data, and technology to create digital experiences that are visually engaging, user-friendly, and aligned with business outcomes.

This role is adapted from the structure and expectations of your earlier design JD, but refined for a junior-level UI/UX Designer with stronger visual design capability and relevance to the current AI-enabled design environment.

Role Summary


We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer with 1-3 years of experience to join our team in Pune.
The ideal candidate should have a strong foundation in visual design, website and landing page layouting, and basic user experience principles.
This role requires someone who can contribute as a visualiser, meaning the person should be able to convert a creative brief, brand direction, or reference into compelling digital concepts and polished interface designs.
The candidate should be comfortable working on website pages, campaign landing pages, digital assets, and UI layouts, while collaborating with design leads, developers, content teams, and account managers. Familiarity with modern AI-assisted design workflows will be an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


Visual Design and Creative Execution


Create visually strong and brand-aligned designs for websites, landing pages, microsites, and digital interfaces.

Develop page mockups, section designs, banners, and visual concepts based on project briefs.

Contribute as a visualiser by exploring multiple design directions and converting ideas into polished layouts.

Ensure all designs maintain strong visual hierarchy, typography, colour balance, spacing, and overall composition.


UI/UX Design Support


Prepare wireframes, screen layouts, and interface structures based on business and user requirements.

Apply basic UX principles to ensure clarity, ease of navigation, and usability.

Design layouts that support customer journeys, call-to-action visibility, and responsive behaviour across devices.

Create designs that are responsive, mobile-friendly, and optimised for different screen sizes.

Work under the guidance of senior team members to continuously improve design quality and user experience.


Design Tools and Workflow


Use Figma for wireframing, visual design, prototyping, and collaborative reviews.

Follow established design systems, style guides, and brand guidelines.

Maintain well-structured and organised design files for internal collaboration and development handoff.

Use AI-assisted tools, where relevant, for concept exploration, design ideation, and creative acceleration under team guidance.


Cross-Functional Collaboration


Work closely with UI/UX leads, developers, content teams, and project stakeholders.

Understand project requirements and incorporate feedback in a timely and effective manner.

Support smooth design-to-development handoff by preparing clear and implementation-friendly files.

Participate in design reviews, internal discussions, and project meetings as required.


Quality and Consistency


Ensure consistency in design execution across screens, pages, and digital assets.

Maintain attention to detail in layout structure, content alignment, and responsive design behaviour.

Follow basic accessibility and usability best practices.

Deliver work within timelines and quality expectations.

Required Qualifications


1-3 years of relevant experience in UI design, visual design, web design, or digital creative design.
Strong portfolio demonstrating work in website design, landing pages, campaign layouts, or digital interfaces.
Prior visualiser experience is important for this role.
Good working knowledge of Figma.
Basic understanding of UI/UX principles, responsive design, and digital user journeys.
Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.


Must-Have Skills


Strong visual design sense with good understanding of typography, layout, spacing, colour, and composition.
Experience in creating website layouts, landing pages, and digital design mockups.
Good understanding of responsive and mobile-friendly design for websites, landing pages, and digital interfaces.
Ability to work as a visualiser and generate creative design directions from a brief.
Good proficiency in Figma.
Familiarity with AI-assisted design tools such as Lovable, Google AI Studio, Claude, or image generation tools.
Basic understanding of UI components, user flows, and screen structure.
Ability to interpret brand guidelines and apply them consistently across designs.
Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn.


Good-to-Have Skills


Knowledge of Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.
Exposure to design systems and reusable UI components.
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS for better coordination with development teams.
Understanding of accessibility-friendly design practices.
Prior experience in agency, digital, or Martech environments.


Preferred Candidate Profile


Creative and visually strong, with a good eye for digital aesthetics.
Able to balance visual appeal with usability and clarity.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple projects.
Open to feedback and able to improve designs through iteration.
Interested in learning modern tools, including AI-assisted design workflows.

title: Associate Intercompany Anlayst
description:
At Ecolab, you can help take on some of the world’s most meaningful challenges, delivering critical insights and innovative solutions to help our customers achieve clean water, safe food, abundant energy and healthy environments. With our worldwide reach and ambitious growth plans, you will have the opportunity to own your future and impact what matters. Are you ready to make an impact?

Ecolab is searching for a driven Intercompany Accounting Analyst for future opportunities within our Finance division in Pune, India. The Intercompany Accounting Analyst is responsible for end-to-end processing of intercompany invoices in SAP, including both PO-based and non-PO-based transactions & Global reporting. This requires expertise in Excel & SAP T-codes for invoice posting and reversals ensuring accuracy and comply with DTP, policies, procedures and deadlines.

What’s In It For You


You will join a growth company offering a competitive salary and benefits.
The ability to make an impact and shape your career with a company that is passionate about growth.
The support of an organization that believes it is vital to include and engage diverse people, perspectives and ideas to achieve our best.
Feel proud each day to work for a company that provides clean water, safe food, abundant energy and healthy environments.


What You Will Do


Post intercompany invoices and journal entries in SAP for cross-company transactions.
Ensure accurate coding and documentation of invoices in compliance with internal policies.
Monitor and resolve pending invoice requests and discrepancies.
Update various reports with current month-end information
Manage ERP and technologies tools like SAP, Service now, OnBase, & HFM tool etc.
Respond to queries related to invoice status, reversals, and payment purpose codes.
Understand and apply Withholding Tax rules relevant to intercompany transactions.
Take full and proactive ownership of issues and queries.
Ensure correct selection and usage of Intercompany GL accounts during invoice posting to reflect accurate financial reporting.
Maintain fluid communication with stakeholders and other GBS+ teams.
Collaborate with Team Leads and Senior analysts in the planning, development, and implementation of projects.
Support Team Leads in preparation of trainings and in the detection of training opportunities.
Assist and train Junior Analysts in their daily work
Basic knowledge of how mismatches occur between two entities' books.
Elimination process at month-ends complying with SOX 801.


Minimum Qualifications


Degree in Accounting or Finance.
Advanced English level (oral and writing).
Proficient in Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, etc.) and other Microsoft tools.
Strong command over all SAP T-codes used in Accounts Payable, especially for invoice processing, reversals, etc.
Knowledge of Blackline, Oracle and Power BI will be a plus.


Skills


Ability to meet month-end close and other timeline
Good analytical and problem-solving skills
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Good interpersonal skills - attention to detail
Team-focused, results oriented
Ability to work with deadlines, under pressure with a track record of delivery.
Flexible and Open for All RTR IC work


A trusted partner for millions of customers, Ecolab is a global sustainability leader offering water, hygiene and infection prevention solutions and services that protect people and the resources vital to life. Building on a century of innovation, Ecolab has annual sales of $14 billion, employs more than 47,000 associates and operates in more than 170 countries around the world. The company delivers comprehensive science-based solutions, data-driven insights and world-class service to advance food safety, maintain clean and safe environments, and optimize water and energy use. Ecolab’s innovative solutions improve operational efficiencies and sustainability for customers in the food, healthcare, life sciences, hospitality and industrial markets. www.ecolab.com

Follow us on LinkedIn@Ecolab, Twitter@Ecolab, Instagram@Ecolab_Inc and Facebook @Ecolab.

Nuestro compromiso con una cultura de inclusión y pertenencia

Ecolab está comprometido con el trato justo e igualitario de todas las personas colaboradoras y postulantes, y con la promoción de los principios de igualdad de oportunidades en el empleo. Reclutaremos, contrataremos, promoveremos, transferiremos y brindaremos oportunidades de desarrollo con base en las calificaciones individuales y el desempeño laboral, en todos los aspectos relacionados con el empleo, la compensación, los beneficios, las condiciones laborales y las oportunidades de crecimiento. Ecolab no discriminará a ninguna persona colaboradora ni postulante por motivos de raza, religión, color, credo, nacionalidad, estado de ciudadanía, sexo, orientación sexual, identidad y expresión de género, información genética, estado civil, edad o discapacidad.

• Support research related to site context, spatial systems, and design strategies

• Prepare drawings, diagrams, and visual material for design discussions

• Develop 3D models and visualisations to support concept presentations

• Assist in preparation of presentation material and project documentation

• Contribute ideas during internal design discussions and reviews

• Maintain organized drawing files and documentation records

• Bachelor’s degree in Architecture

• 0–1 year of experience in architectural design

• Interest in conceptual design and research-oriented architectural processes

• Ability to approach design problems analytically and creatively

• Basic familiarity with architectural software such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, Rhino, or similar tools

• Ability to communicate design ideas through drawings, diagrams, and models

• Good collaboration and communication skills

Location: Ashok Nagar, Pune

Working days: Monday - Friday (10:00 AM - 6:00 PM)

title: Accountant P2P (Intercompany)
description:
About SKF



SKF started its operations in India in 1923. Today, SKF provides industry leading automotive and industrial engineered solutions through its five technology-centric platforms: bearings and units, seals, mechatronics, lubrication solutions and services. Over the years the company has evolved from being a pioneer ball bearing manufacturing company to a knowledge-driven engineering company helping customers achieve sustainable and competitive business excellence.



SKF's solutions provide sustainable ways for companies across the automotive and industrial sectors to achieve breakthroughs in friction reduction, energy efficiency, and equipment longevity and reliability. With a strong commitment to research-based innovation, SKF India offers customized value-added solutions that integrate all its five technology platforms.



About the organization: www.skf.com /in



SKF Purpose Statement



Together, we re-imagine rotation for a better tomorrow.



By creating intelligent and clean solutions for people and the planet



Role Title: Accountant P2P (Intercompany)



Reports to: Senior Accountant P2P



Role Tye: Individual Role



Job Location: Chinchwad, Pune



Purpose of the role



As Accountant P2P, you will be a key member of the P2P team, responsible for overseeing and executing the end-to-end accounts payable process. Leveraging your expertise in accounts payable, you will contribute to the efficient and accurate processing of invoices, vendor management, and adherence to financial policies.



Your day-to-day work/ Key Responsibilities



Invoice Processing:



Lead the processing of invoices, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and compliance with company policies.
Review and approve invoices for payment, resolving discrepancies and exceptions.



Vendor Management:



Act as a primary point of contact for vendors, addressing inquiries, and maintaining positive relationships.
Conduct regular vendor statement reconciliations and collaborate on dispute resolution.



Payment Processing:



Manage the timely and accurate processing of payments, optimizing cash flow and taking advantage of early payment discounts.
Oversee the reconciliation of payments to ensure accuracy.



Policy Compliance:



Ensure strict adherence to company policies, accounting principles, and regulatory requirements.
Stay informed about changes in accounting standards and payment regulations.



Process Improvement:



Identify opportunities for process improvement within the accounts payable function.
Implement best practices to enhance efficiency, accuracy, and overall effectiveness.



Training and Guidance:



Provide guidance and mentorship to junior accounts payable staff.
Conduct training sessions to enhance the skills and knowledge of the team.



Reporting and Analysis:



Generate and analyze accounts payable reports, providing insights into trends and areas for improvement.
Collaborate with finance and management teams on financial analysis.



Cross-Functional Collaboration:



Collaborate with other departments, including procurement and finance, to optimize end-to-end processes.



Basic knowledge of netting and IDPMS & EDPMS



IDPMS (Import Data Processing and Monitoring System)
EDPMS (Export Data Processing and Monitoring System)
We offer
A stimulating and challenging job in an international and developing environment
Opportunity to be part of an experienced and open-minded team
Get an in-depth knowledge of best in class Finance processes
We expect you to have:
6 to 12 years of professional work experience in account payable (P2P function) bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or related field.
In-depth knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities with international stakeholders
Proficiency in accounts payable software (SAP S4 Hana/ MAPICS/ SARA / Basware/ Payment Factory/ SAP BI reports/ Power BI) and Microsoft Excel
Experience of working in a Manufacturing Set-up/ Exposure working in a Shared services Centre will be an added advantage



Interested candidate/s can share their resume to hema.chaudhary@skf.com



About SKF



SKF has been around for more than a century and today we are one of the world’s largest global suppliers of bearings and supporting solutions for rotating equipment. With more than 40,000 employees in around 130 countries, we are truly global. Our products are found everywhere in society. In fact, wherever there is movement, SKF’s solutions might be at work. This means that we are an important part of the everyday lives of people and companies around the world. See more, at www.skf.com.

title: Junior L1 Genesys Support Engineer (EST Shift, Remote India)
description:
Miratech helps visionaries change the world. We are a global IT services and consulting company that brings together enterprise and start-up innovation. Today, we support digital transformation for some of the world's largest enterprises. By partnering with both large and small players, we stay at the leading edge of technology, remain nimble even as a global leader, and create technology that helps our clients further enhance their business. We are a values-driven organization and our culture of Relentless Performance has enabled over 99% of Miratech's engagements to succeed by meeting or exceeding our scope, schedule, and/or budget objectives since our inception in 1989.

Miratech has coverage across 5 continents and operates in over 25 countries around the world. Miratech retains nearly 1000 full-time professionals, and our annual growth rate exceeds 25%.

Job Description

We are looking for a Junior L1 Genesys Support Engineer for Genesys Cloud-related projects to perform callflows minor updates, upgrades, changes, and timely resolve clients' issues, following EST time zone for work for full-time and full-remote employment.

This is a great opportunity for a real quick learner, customer-focused technical individual, patient and attentive to detail person, who is ready to work in a team, willing to develop support services, and learn Genesys technology.

This person will possess a demonstrable and successful background in understanding and managing clients’ inquiries, resolving reported issues by performing troubleshooting, and escalating everything else to the remaining tiers in the operating model.

Please note that this position is aligned with US Eastern Time (EST).

In Indian Standard Time (IST), the expected schedule is typically evening to early morning (around 6:30 PM – 3:30 AM IST)

Responsibilities:


Receiving & processing requests per alerts & calls, within the defined SLA.
Clarification of the incoming request with the Customers, ticket creation, and routing of the ticket to L2 Engineer.
Timely reaction to calls and alerts
Following support procedures and participation in procedures improvement
Acknowledging alerts from the OpsGenie
Creating tickets
Implementing fixes of L1/L2 level according to pre-defined procedures


Qualifications


Expertise in troubleshooting and root cause analysis, including log review and issue diagnostics.
Experience in Technical Support.
Understanding of SLA principles with the ability to work within SLA requirements.
High attention to detail and a responsible, patient approach to problem-solving.
Eagerness to grow and develop within Support Services.
Fast learner with a proactive mindset.
Collaborative team player with a continuous learning attitude.
Interest in developing knowledge of Genesys technologies.


Additional Information

We offer:


Culture of Relentless Performance: join an unstoppable technology development team with a 99% project success rate and more than 30% year-over-year revenue growth.
Competitive Pay and Benefits: enjoy a comprehensive compensation and benefits package, including health insurance, and a relocation program.
Work From Anywhere Culture: make the most of the flexibility that comes with remote work.
Growth Mindset: reap the benefits of a range of professional development opportunities, including certification programs, mentorship and talent investment programs, internal mobility and internship opportunities.
Global Impact: collaborate on impactful projects for top global clients and shape the future of industries.
Welcoming Multicultural Environment: be a part of a dynamic, global team and thrive in an inclusive and supportive work environment with open communication and regular team-building company social events.
Social Sustainability Values: join our sustainable business practices focused on five pillars, including IT education, community empowerment, fair operating practices, environmental sustainability, and gender equality.
Miratech is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other protected status under applicable law.

title: Engineer
description:
We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Engineer to join our Railway Design Team, specializing in alignment, track, and structural engineering. The role involves assisting in the preparation of railway alignment designs, geometric layouts, trackwork planning, and structural detailing under the guidance of senior engineers. Responsibilities include developing CAD drawings, preparing design reports, coordinating with multidisciplinary teams, supporting site teams with design clarifications, and ensuring compliance with railway standards (Indian Railways, RDSO, AREMA, UIC, or FIDIC). The candidate should possess a basic understanding of the design of civil structures such as bridges, viaducts, and culverts, along with knowledge of geotechnical investigations (GTI) and embankment design for railway formation. Exposure to slab track and ballasted track systems, drainage concepts, and interface requirements will be an added advantage. Strong analytical skills, proficiency in design software (AutoCAD, Civil 3D, STAAD, or similar), and the ability to interpret technical specifications are essential. This role provides excellent opportunities to learn advanced railway engineering practices, gain hands-on project experience, and build a strong foundation for a career in large-scale rail and metro infrastructure projects.

title: Junior Engineer
description:
Amex GBT is a place where colleagues find inspiration in travel as a force for good and – through their work – can make an impact on our industry. We’re here to help our colleagues achieve success and offer an inclusive and collaborative culture where your voice is valued.

What You’ll Do


Troubleshooting skills with Log analysis, Tracing, Heap dump analysis, Performance issues, and debugging.
Responsible for the development, optimization, and maintenance of iPaaS solutions and NetSuite customizations.
Docker, GitHub, Jenkins – create basis pipelines, understanding of Platform as a Service (PaaS) for application hosting.

Low-level design documentation – Class, sequence diagrams
Understanding of Static code analysis tools like Sonar, Conducting code reviews.

What We’re Looking For

title: Purchase Manager
description:
PURPOSE

This position is responsible for leading and optimize the procurement function for a unit by sourcing quality goods and services at the best value, ensuring timely availability to meet operational needs. The role focuses on developing strong vendor relationships, enforcing compliance with procurement policies, and driving cost efficiency while supporting overall business objectives.




REPORTS TO

Business Head| General Manager Purchase




INTERACTS WITH

External: Vendors, Consultants, Service Providers, Statutory Authorities, and Contractors.

Internal: Senior Leadership, Finance, Projects, Engineering, Operations, and Administration Teams.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Drive Operational Excellence

Oversee end-to-end procurement operations including vendor identification, negotiation, contracting, and timely delivery.
Ensure adherence to standardized procurement procedures and maintain rigorous documentation for audit readiness.
Streamline purchase workflows to minimize lead times and avoid operational disruptions.

Applied Learning

Continuously track market trends, new suppliers, and technological advancements in procurement to improve sourcing strategies.
Introduce best practices and innovative solutions to enhance supplier performance and cost efficiency.
Train relevant stakeholders on procurement processes, compliance requirements, and vendor management protocols.

People & Vendor Management

Build and maintain long-term, strategic vendor relationships to secure favorable terms and reliable supply.
Collaborate with internal departments to accurately forecast material requirements.
Lead supplier evaluation programs to ensure consistent quality, cost-effectiveness, and service levels.

Business & Financial Acumen

Develop and monitor procurement budgets, ensuring optimal allocation of resources.
Negotiate contracts to maximize value while minimizing financial and operational risks.
Present monthly procurement dashboards including spend analysis, savings achieved, supplier performance metrics, and forecasted requirements.

Leadership

Collaborate with senior management to align procurement strategies with overall business objectives.
Lead policy rollouts, system upgrades, and strategic sourcing initiatives that drive competitive advantage.
Uphold integrity, ethics, and confidentiality in all procurement dealings while mentoring junior team members where applicable.

Compliance & Risk Management

Ensure all procurement activities comply with statutory laws, organizational policies, and ethical standards.
Maintain supplier records, contracts, and correspondence to meet internal and external audit requirements.
Identify and mitigate supply chain risks through contingency planning.

Occupational Health & Safety Responsibilities

Ensure suppliers comply with organizational and legal OH&S standards.
Work with suppliers to identify and eliminate potential workplace safety hazards in the supply chain.
Monitor compliance with safety protocols during delivery, handling, and storage of goods.




WORK EXPERIENCE




JOB REQUIREMENTS / HIRING PROFILE




QUALIFICATIONS

Degree/ Postgraduate degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related field




WORK EXPERIENCE

Minimum 10 years’ proven experience in procurement, vendor management, and strategic sourcing, preferably in hospitality, premium retail, or large-scale operations

title: HR Generalist
description:
HR Generalist (HR Operations & Payroll - SaaS Environment)

Experience: 1 – 2 years

About The Role

We are looking for a proactive HR Generalist who can independently manage recruitment, payroll coordination, and HRMS operations. This role requires someone comfortable taking ownership in a fast-paced SaaS environment and driving HR processes with minimal supervision.

Key Responsibilities


Recruitment & Hiring
Manage end-to-end recruitment for junior to mid-level roles
Source candidates through LinkedIn, job portals, and other channels
Conduct initial screenings and coordinate interviews
Ensure a smooth and positive candidate experience
Payroll & HR Operations
Own and manage monthly payroll inputs, validations, and coordination
Manage attendance, leave tracking, and employee records
Ensure accurate and timely HR data management
Handle the complete employee lifecycle (onboarding to exit formalities)
HRMS & SaaS HR Management
Independently manage HRMS, especially Zoho People
Maintain and optimize employee data, workflows, and reports
Identify process gaps and drive improvements using HR tech
Ensure data accuracy and compliance through HR systems
Employee Engagement & Support
Act as the first point of contact for employee queries
Support and execute engagement initiatives
Help maintain a positive and structured work environment
HR Processes & Compliance
Ensure adherence to company policies and HR processes
Maintain documentation and compliance records
Support audits and HR reporting


Requirements


Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field
1 – 2 years of relevant HR experience
Hands-on experience with Zoho People (mandatory)
Working knowledge of payroll processes
Strong communication and coordination skills


Preferred Skills


Experience in a SaaS/startup environment
Familiarity with HR analytics/reporting
Ability to manage responsibilities independently
Proactive, detail-oriented, and solution-driven mindset


What We Offer


High ownership and hands-on exposure across HR functions
Fast-paced, growth-oriented work environment
Opportunity to build strong expertise in HR operations and systems

description:

Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.

title: Investment Banking Analyst
description:
Investment Banking Analyst (Graduates and Experienced Hires) - Bengaluru

Please apply to Mumbai on our separate vacancy if that is closer to your location







Our Client

Our subsidiary CF Invest, is a dedicated recruitment firm focused on positions in the investment sector.




We are recruiting on behalf of our client, one of the bulge bracket bank and pre-eminent investment banks.




This tier one firm works with us to select the highest calibre talent in the global markets at entry and experienced entry level across their global offices on an ongoing basis through the first half of each year, with the view of onboarding immediately or upon graduation.




Our client is looking for two professionals to join their Investment Banking team in Bengaluru as an Analyst and use their skills and ideas to make an impact on the success of the bank. You will either be placed in their FIG, TMT or Energy Group or possibly another division as they also seek cross industry including but not limited to Industrials, Healthcare and Consumer.




The role requires talent to advise clients on various financial transactions, including mergers and acquisitions, equity/equity-linked and debt financings, joint ventures, restructurings, and financial investments.







Your Focus

As an Investment Banking Analyst, your focus is on supporting clients through complex capital markets and advisory transactions, including mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. You will work closely with senior bankers to analyse opportunities, structure transactions, and help clients make informed strategic decisions.




The role is execution-driven and detail-intensive. You will build and maintain financial analyses, support transaction execution, and contribute to client materials used in live deals. You will also help assess risk, ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements, and maintain the highest standards of accuracy, judgement, and professionalism.




This role suits someone who is analytically rigorous, commercially aware, and motivated by working at pace on high-stakes transactions. You will be expected to take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with colleagues and clients, and contribute meaningfully to deal delivery in a demanding, regulated environment.







Responsibilities

Support the execution of investment banking transactions, including M&A, capital raising, and strategic advisory mandates
Build and maintain detailed financial models and analyses to evaluate transactions and strategic options
Prepare client-facing materials, including pitch decks, information memoranda, and transaction documentation
Conduct company, industry, and market research to support deal origination and execution
Assist senior bankers in coordinating transaction workstreams and managing timelines
Support due diligence processes, including data analysis and coordination with internal and external stakeholders
Contribute to client development activities through research, analysis, and preparation of marketing materials
Assess transaction-related risks and support adherence to regulatory, compliance, and internal control requirements
Maintain high standards of accuracy, organisation, and confidentiality across all work
Work effectively with colleagues across banking, markets, legal, risk, and compliance teams




This role is about supporting the execution of complex investment banking transactions and helping clients make informed strategic and capital decisions.




You can absorb detailed financial and commercial information quickly, analyse companies, transactions, and market conditions with rigour, and form clear, well-reasoned conclusions. You approach problems with structure and discipline, and you are comfortable working under pressure as deals progress and priorities evolve.







Minimum Qualifications




Graduate – Analyst

Bachelor’s degree ideally in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline. We accept also individuals from any degree, especially those numerate based
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear client-ready materials
High attention to detail and strong organisational skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
Sound judgement and a strong understanding of risk, compliance, and regulatory expectations
We consider any degree or subject and although your grade indicates your ability to absorb data and apply it, your degree grade does not influence your chance of applying to us and being interviewed.







Process

This application shall be open until we reach a cap of applicants, so please apply early. We are hiring for our client across their key global markets.




Be sure to Follow Us on LinkedIn for updates on this vacancy and others: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cfcorp




Your first step is to apply with your LinkedIn profile and CV. We do not need a covering letter. Due to the volume of applications we receive, we are unfortunately unable to provide individual feedback.







Reward Structure

Analyst annual base salary of 125,000 and up to 150,000 United States Dollars depending on experience. Your salary will be paid in Indian Rupees and bonus in USD
Bonus program of on-target bonus of 50% of base salary and up to 125% for high-achievers
Relocation is provided by the company

title: Full Stack Developer (React & Node )
description:
Your potential, unleashed.




India’s impact on the global economy has increased at an exponential rate and Deloitte presents an opportunity to unleash and realize your potential amongst cutting edge leaders, and organizations shaping the future of the region, and indeed, the world beyond.

At Deloitte, your whole self to work, every day. Combine that with our drive to propel with purpose and you have the perfect playground to collaborate, innovate, grow, and make an impact that matters.




What impact will you make?




Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services, Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential

Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.




The Team




Deloitte Digital has created a new model for a new age: the creative digital consultancy. We're transforming the digital journey in a way an agency or traditional consultancy alone cannot–now leaders across their entire organization can come to one place to have their ambitions brought to life. We combined the creative and digital capabilities of our studios and the broad reach of an advertising agency with the technical experience, deep business strategy, and relationships of one of the world's largest consultancy to create something that is so much more than the sum of its parts. We can help you imagine bigger and scale as your business grows. Learn more about Digital




Work you’ll do







Role: Full Stack Software Engineer (React & Node.js)




Designation: Senior Consultant

Location: Bangalore

Notice period: Immediate Joiner

Education: B. Tech




Position Overview




The Full Stack Software Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and operating scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications for enterprise platforms. This role focuses on building modern full-stack systems using React for front-end development and Node.js for backend services, while leveraging cloud technologies such as AWS and Azure.

As part of the Enterprise Services – Data & AI organization, the engineer will contribute to platforms that power AI-enabled workflows and enterprise applications across the organization. The role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams including architects, product owners, security teams, and engineers to build reliable, enterprise-grade solutions.




Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications using React.js for front-end and Node.js for back-end services.
Build scalable and secure enterprise applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and microservices architecture.
Develop and integrate RESTful APIs and enterprise services to enable AI-powered workflows and enterprise platforms.
Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms such as AWS and Azure, ensuring performance, reliability, and scalability.
Design and optimize SQL database schemas, queries, and data storage solutions.
Implement CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation using tools such as GitHub Actions and Terraform.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver solutions aligned with Agile and DevOps methodologies.
Write clean, testable, well-documented code to support maintainability and long-term platform development.
Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and agile ceremonies.
Implement best practices related to security, compliance, and enterprise software standards.
Contribute to AI-enabled systems, including technologies such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), NLP pipelines, and automation workflows.
Support enterprise platforms with capabilities such as identity-aware APIs, observability, and edge services.




Required Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.
Good to have Experience in Python
5+ years of professional experience in software development (or 3+ years with an advanced degree).
Strong experience building full-stack web applications.
Proficiency in React.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks.
Backend development experience with Node.js and RESTful APIs.
Experience working with SQL databases and data modeling.
Experience deploying applications on AWS and/or Azure cloud platforms.
Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and version control systems such as GitHub.
Strong understanding of responsive front-end design and scalable backend architecture.




Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with Docker and containerization technologies.
Familiarity with Kubernetes or container orchestration platforms.
Exposure to AI technologies such as RAG, NLP, LLMs, or agent-based workflows.
Experience building or consuming secure, identity-aware APIs.
Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to navigate ambiguity and deliver end-to-end solutions.
Understanding of Agile and DevOps best practices.
Curiosity and willingness to explore complex enterprise software platforms and emerging technologies.




How you’ll grow




At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build world-class skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Centre.







Benefits

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.




Our purpose

Deloitte is led by a purpose: To make an impact that matters.

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the

Communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change. Learn more about Deloitte's impact on the world




Recruiter tips

We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: Investment Banking Summer Analyst
description:
This role is for the Bengaluru office. Those across India can apply.







Our Client

Our subsidiary Global Markets Recruitment (“GMR”) is a dedicated recruitment firm focused on emerging and developed markets at entry to middle-management level.




We have been asked to asked by our client to run a campaign to identify entry level interns for this summer 2026. Our client is a bulge bracket bank and one of the pre-eminent investment banks.




This tier one firm works with us to select the highest calibre talent in the global markets at entry and experienced entry level across their global offices. We will run campaigns for them on an ongoing basis through the first half of this year.




Our client is looking for people in their global offices and we will post these roles for each location. Please apply to the location closest to you.




You will either be placed in their FIG or TMT Group or possibly another division as they also seek cross industry people also in energy, Industrials, Healthcare and Consumer.




The role requires talent to advise clients on various financial transactions, including mergers and acquisitions, equity/equity-linked and debt financings, joint ventures, restructurings, and financial investments.







Your Focus

As an Investment Banking Analyst - Intern, your focus is on supporting clients through complex capital markets and advisory transactions, including mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. You will work closely with senior bankers to analyse opportunities, structure transactions, and help clients make informed strategic decisions.




The role is execution-driven and detail-intensive. You will build and maintain financial analyses, support transaction execution, and contribute to client materials used in live deals. You will also help assess risk, ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements, and maintain the highest standards of accuracy, judgement, and professionalism.




This role suits someone who is analytically rigorous, commercially aware, and motivated by working at pace on high-stakes transactions. You will be expected to take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with colleagues and clients, and contribute meaningfully to deal delivery in a demanding, regulated environment.







Responsibilities

Support the execution of investment banking transactions, including M&A, capital raising, and strategic advisory mandates
Build and maintain detailed financial models and analyses to evaluate transactions and strategic options
Prepare client-facing materials, including pitch decks, information memoranda, and transaction documentation
Conduct company, industry, and market research to support deal origination and execution
Assist senior bankers in coordinating transaction workstreams and managing timelines
Support due diligence processes, including data analysis and coordination with internal and external stakeholders
Contribute to client development activities through research, analysis, and preparation of marketing materials
Assess transaction-related risks and support adherence to regulatory, compliance, and internal control requirements
Maintain high standards of accuracy, organisation, and confidentiality across all work
Work effectively with colleagues across banking, markets, legal, risk, and compliance teams




This role is about supporting the execution of complex investment banking transactions and helping clients make informed strategic and capital decisions.




You can absorb detailed financial and commercial information quickly, analyse companies, transactions, and market conditions with rigour, and form clear, well-reasoned conclusions. You approach problems with structure and discipline, and you are comfortable working under pressure as deals progress and priorities evolve.







Minimum Qualifications

Graduate – Analyst

At university studying any degree ideally in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline. We accept also individuals from any degree, especially those numerate based including Scientific, Engineering, Arts etc
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear client-ready materials
High attention to detail and strong organisational skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
Sound judgement and a strong understanding of risk, compliance, and regulatory expectations







Process

This application shall be open until we reach a cap of applicants, so please apply early. We are hiring for our client across their key global markets. Thereafter once selected, you will undergo our client one day assessment centre four interviews and one group role play. A decision will be made on the day.




Be sure to Follow Us on LinkedIn for updates on this vacancy and others: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cfcorp




Your first step is to apply with your LinkedIn profile and CV. We do not need a covering letter. Due to the volume of applications we receive, we are unfortunately unable to provide individual feedback.







Reward Structure

You will be well compensated for this time and the intern program will last for six weeks. We are running three programs from mid-June, end June and mid-July
Receive a bonus for your time
A permanent offer of employment and part of the Banks’ graduate program
Relocation is provided by the company. Starting salaries will be paid in USD for India $125,000 and up to $150,000 depending on experience
Bonus program of on-target bonus of 50% of base salary and up to 125% for high-achievers.

title: HR Intern
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Working Days: 6 Days a Week

Experience: Fresher (0–1 year)

Duration: 3 months

About the Role:

We are looking for a proactive and energetic HR Intern to support our day-to-day recruitment activities. This role is perfect for someone who wants to kick-start their career in HR, enjoys interacting with people, and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment.

Key Responsibilities:


Support end-to-end hiring for fresher and entry-level roles
Source, screen, and call candidates for various positions
Schedule and coordinate interviews with hiring panels
Maintain candidate trackers and ensure timely follow-ups
Assist in releasing offer letters and completing onboarding documentation
Ensure strong communication and coordination between candidates and internal stakeholders
Contribute to improving hiring processes and candidate experience



Requirements:


Good written and verbal communication skills
Strong organizational and follow-up abilities
Proactive attitude and willingness to learn
Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment
Ability to manage multiple tasks at once
Available to work 6 days a week



Additional information:


Free Lunch + Snacks Daily
Cool workspace and fun team environment
Exclusive project goodies



Our Values


Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback.
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct!
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry.
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description.



About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy

title: People Consulting-Learning-Staff
description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.

We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.

Join EY and help to build a better working world.

EY- Global Delivery Services (GDS) – People Consulting (PC) – SAP/Systems Implementation Learning Consultant:

At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.

We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.

Join EY and help to build a better working world.

About Global Delivery Services

Global Delivery Services refers to EY's worldwide network of service delivery centers. The GDS team plays an important role in EY’s strategy by ensuring effective support to EY’s growth agenda.

Our journey started in 2002 with approximately 200 people. Today we stand at 80,000+ professionals in ten locations around the world. We operate in Argentina, China, Hungary, India, Philippines, Poland, Sri Lanka, Mexico, Spain and the United Kingdom.

Client service is focused on providing Consulting, Assurance, Tax, Strategy & Transactions, and Knowledge support to our clients around the world. The teams enable account teams worldwide to provide seamless, high-quality, value-added support, helping deliver exceptional client service.

Enablement Services provides cost-effective, high-skilled, and innovative services to support EY’s global and local enablement teams. Markets, BMC, AWS, Finance and Accounting, Risk Management, Procurement, People Shared Services, IT Service Delivery and IT Global Infrastructure services, are among the services offered by Enablement Services.

Our innovation specialists serve the GDS Client Service and Enablement Services teams, along with Service Lines, Core Business Services and Sectors. The team brings the desired environment, technologies and skilled teams together for facilitation, rapid prototyping and innovative thinking. The competencies offered include analytics, digital, user experience, mobile technology, infrastructure, Microsoft technologies and open innovation.

The Opportunity

We are looking for Instructional Design Consultants with expertise in System Implementation/SAP projects to join the GDS PC team. This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a leading global professional services organisation whilst being instrumental in growth of the GDS PC team.

Your Key Responsibilities


Collaborate with SAP/Systems Implementation (SI) consultants, developers, subject matter experts (SMEs), and other key stakeholders to identify target audience training needs
Utilize ADDIE, Kirkpatrick, and other recognized models to design and develop engaging SAP/SI course content and learning activities
Determine instructional end goals and create supporting material/media for SAP/SI projects (audio, video, simulations, role-plays, games etc)
Decide on the criteria used to judge learner’s performance and develop assessment instruments
Ensure high quality deliverables are produced for the project by exhaustive internal reviews and obtain excellent feedback from the client and global project counterparts
Maintaining and updating the training materials and documentation according to the changes and updates in the SAP system and business requirements
Effectively communicate and collaborate to build strong relationships with clients and other project team members
Support development of collaterals, tools, techniques, and methodologies to develop the practice
Contribute to thought leadership development for the SAP/SI learning domain


Skills And Attributes For Success


Ability to manage ambiguity and be proactive
Extremely sharp attention to detail
Strong communication and presentation skills
Cross cultural awareness and sensitivity
High energy levels, agility and adaptability
Ability to comprehend new content and topics across different domains
Open to travel for client projects that are approved as per EY and country specific travel advisory guidelines


To qualify for the role, you must have


Bachelor’s or associate degree with 2 - 4 years of relevant experience
Proven experience and knowledge of SAP systems, modules, and functions, such as SAP FI, SAP HR, SAP MM, S4/HANA etc
Knowledge of multiple ERP systems, such as Oracle, Workday etc is a plus
Excellent knowledge of storyboarding, visual design principles, and branding guidelines
Effective writing skills (grasp and command over English)
Proficiency in MS PowerPoint and MS Excel
Ability to articulate design decisions, suggestions and provide creative direction
Proficiency with one or more course authoring and learning tools: SAP EnableNow, Articulate Storyline, Adobe Captivate, WalkMe, Camtasia, Vyond, VideoScribe
Experience developing a wide range of digital learning deliverables: Web-based learning, Videos, Interactive PDFs, Webcasts, Podcasts, nano-learnings, VILT


Ideally, you’ll also


Experience with a data-driven approach to instructional design, using both qualitative and quantitative data to optimize content efficacy
Knowledge of course development software and at least one Learning Management System


What We Look For


Learning experts in the SAP/SI domain with commercial acumen, relevant experiences and high degree of enthusiasm to adapt and learn in a fast-moving environment
Knowledge and experience of working in a cross-cultural setup


What We Offer You

At EY, we’ll develop you with future-focused skills and equip you with world-class experiences. We’ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams. Learn more.

Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.

To help create an equitable and inclusive experience during the recruitment process, please inform us as soon as possible about any disability-related adjustments or accommodations you may need.

Our Commitment: As a commitment, we persistently endeavour to embody our values, fulfil our purpose, and champion inclusiveness. Our dedication is to cultivate EY into an environment where diverse perspectives are celebrated, creating a supportive atmosphere for individuals to authentically be themselves and contribute their utmost.

Professional Development: From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe in continuous learning. We offer opportunities to build new skills, take on leadership roles, and connect and grow through mentorship.

People and Culture: In our dynamic workplace, diversity, equity, and inclusiveness are ingrained in our culture. We're united by a commitment to create an environment where every individual's differences are valued, practices are equitable, fostering a sense of belonging. Our shared values include integrity, respect, teaming, inclusiveness, energy, enthusiasm, courage to lead, and building relationships based on doing the right thing.

Benefits: Embark on a transformative career journey with us and indulge in a suite of premium benefits, encompassing exclusive health and wellness packages, enticing rewards, and cutting-edge learning opportunities that empower you to continually grow and excel in your professional and personal development.

How to Apply: If you are passionate to join us and are aligned with our commitment to building a better working world, we invite you to apply by completing our user-friendly form with personal and professional information and by providing your consent to data privacy.

Successful candidates advance to a competency-based interview. If mutual interest persists, a job offer awaits.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
About OpenFX

OpenFX is on a mission to become the global backbone for cross-border FX transactions. We are building the infrastructure to power the next generation of cross-border payment systems for institutions. The team's execution has been exceptional, and we're scaling remarkably. We're backed by Accel, Atomico, M13, Northzone, NFX, Pantara and other top-tier investors.

The Role

We're hiring an Executive Assistant to support our CEO. This is not an entry-level EA role or an office management position. We are looking for someone with 8+ years of experience as an Executive Assistant, with direct experience supporting C-suite executives at high-growth startups or fast-scaling technology companies. You should have been through the chaos of a company scaling quickly and know how to create order out of it.

You would be based in Bangalore and report to the COO. You will be the CEO's primary point of operational support: managing his calendar across global time zones, coordinating travel, preparing briefing materials, tracking action items from leadership meetings, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks in a fast-moving environment.

The right person for this role is someone who has supported founders or C-level executives at startups that were growing fast — companies where priorities shift quickly, context-switching is constant, and the EA is a true force multiplier rather than a scheduler. If your experience is primarily at large, stable corporations with established support structures, this will feel very different.

Key Responsibilities


Manage the CEO's calendar across global time zones (India, US, EU, UK, UAE), proactively resolving conflicts and ensuring optimal time allocation aligned to company priorities.
Coordinate complex international travel logistics including flights, visas, accommodations, and ground transportation across multiple jurisdictions.
Prepare briefing documents, meeting agendas, and pre-reads for board meetings, investor meetings, regulatory discussions, and internal leadership syncs.
Track and follow up on action items from executive meetings, ensuring accountability across the leadership team.
Manage information flow to and from the CEO — triaging communications, flagging urgent matters, and ensuring the right people have the right context.
Coordinate logistics for leadership offsites, board meetings, and key company events.
Handle sensitive and confidential information with the highest level of discretion.
Serve as a liaison between the CEO and internal teams, external partners, investors, and board members.


Must-haves

What We Are Looking For


8+ years of experience as an Executive Assistant, with direct experience supporting CEO or C-suite executives.
Prior experience at high-growth startups or fast-scaling technology companies is required. You need to have operated in environments where things move fast, priorities shift, and you're expected to anticipate needs before they're articulated.
Expert-level calendar and time management skills across multiple global time zones.
Experience coordinating complex international travel across multiple countries and jurisdictions.
Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail and follow-through.
Outstanding written and verbal communication skills in English.
High discretion and mature judgment in handling confidential information.
Comfort with ambiguity and ability to operate independently with minimal direction.


What Helps You Stand Out


Experience supporting a CEO or founder at a fintech, payments, or financial services company.
Experience working in a globally distributed company across India, US, and European time zones.
Familiarity with tools like Notion, Slack, Google Workspace, and Rippling.
Experience preparing board materials and investor meeting logistics.
Prior experience in a company that scaled from under 100 to over 200 people.


What We Offer


Competitive salary and benefits package benchmarked to your location.
Equity in a rapidly growing company.
Opportunity to work in a fast-paced startup at the forefront of fintech innovation.
Opportunity to make a significant impact on global financial infrastructure.
Collaborative work culture with emphasis on personal and professional growth.


Compensation

Competitive base salary benchmarked to Bangalore market rates, plus equity. We'll share specific ranges during the process.

How To Apply

Send your resume along with a short note on why this role interests you and your relevant experience supporting executives at high-growth companies. We value directness over polish.

We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.

title: Financial Administrator
description:
Job Description

Location: Hyderabad, India (Hybrid)

This is a hybrid position based in Hyderabad, India. We’re committed to your flexibility and wellbeing and our hybrid strategy currently requires three days a week in the office, giving you the option to work remotely for some of your working week. Find out more about our culture of flexible working .

We give you a world of potential.

Support is awesome in the way trust makes it work! When you join this dynamic team as a Financial Administrator, you will enjoy a career, teamwork, flexibility, and leadership you can trust to help accelerate your personal and professional goals. Come be a part of a world of potential at Computershare Business Support Services.

Corporate Trust is a market leader with decades of experience as a provider of trustee and sophisticated agency services for private and public companies, investment bankers, asset managers as well as governments and institutions. We offer a wide range of services that fulfil our clients with a best-in-class reputation built on our high-touch approach to client service we are looking for people to join us and be a part of our exciting future as one of the top corporate trust firms globally. 

If you’re a match to those skills and have the passionate drive to be part of something truly amazing, while working on a diverse team and have the willingness to learn multiple tasks, then this is the perfect opportunity for you!

A role you will love.

The Financial Administrator is responsible for the day-to-day delivery of high-quality operational service that meets service level expectations. The Financial Administrator works closely with their Team Lead to ensure that daily, weekly, and monthly goals are met. The Financial Administrator is responsible for evaluating customer data elements and developing a basic understanding of multiple processes within the line of business. Research, compile, and deliver work unit and individual volume, productivity, quality, and other statistics. Learning and implementing best practices in completing assigned tasks.


Receives detailed instruction on work from Team Lead and performs day to day operational activities with minimal errors and complete tasks within process specific TATs and SLAs.
Coordinates, monitors, and executes daily production of reports used in the work unit.
Required to complete compliance trainings on time without impact to performance.
Work with team leads to address work exception questions.
Coordinates with technical group to resolve simple problems.
Reconcile assigned general ledger accounts.
Revise and implement policies, procedures, and training materials to assure compliance with government regulations and to maximize efficiency and customer service.


What will you bring to the role?


B. Com degree or equivalent; and entry level to 1-year related experience in multinational business environments in India.
The role will require good communication skills in English to be able to provide clear verbal and written communications to staff, peers, senior leadership, and onshore partners. Topics of engagement will range from basic to moderate complexity.
The role requires attention to detail in the work assigned by the team lead. The role holder is expected to respond to and resolve simple to moderately complex problems by identifying and selecting solutions based on acquired domain experience and guided by clear policy and procedure.
Identifies operational requirements and opportunities for improvement and implements whenever necessary.
Flexible towards shift requirement, learning and implementing best practices in completing assigned task.


Rewards designed for you.

Health and wellbeing rewards that can be tailored to support you and your family.

Save for your future. We will support you along your retirement savings journey.

Paid parental leave, flexible working and a caring and inclusive culture.

Income protection. To ease concerns when the unexpected occurs our package includes short and long-term disability benefits, life insurance, supplemental life insurance (single/spouse/family) and more.

And more. Ours is a welcoming and close-knit community, with experienced colleagues ready to help you grow. Our careers hub will help you find out more about our rewards and life at Computershare, visit computershare.com/careershub

About Us

A company to be proud of

We're a global leader in financial administration with over 11,000 employees across more than 22 different countries. At Computershare, it’s more than just a job, our open and inclusive culture means that we will help you to grow, to move forward and make the most of our world of opportunities.

Fairness and culture

We're dedicated to providing you with the opportunity to succeed on your own merits, starting from the application process and continuing throughout your career with us. Our goal is to create an environment where everyone feels valued, to remove barriers and obstacles and ensure equal opportunities for all. For support with accommodations or adjustments during our recruitment process please visit computershare.com/access for further information.

title: Analyst - XA - Client Experience Delivery - Hyderabad
description:
Summary

Position Summary

Analyst - Executive Accelerators – Client Experience Delivery

About Executive Accelerators

Are you striving for a high-performing role where your efforts tangibly support the relationship-building activities of Deloitte’s client teams with the C-Suite executives of our most important clients? Are you interested in taking your current skills to a new level to meet the demands of this role? Can you manage multiple deadlines, multiple stakeholders, multi-task, and work in stimulating dynamics, if so, then this is the role for you; it provides you with the opportunity to help enhance and enable Deloitte’s ability to deepen their C-Suite relationships through the delivery of differentiated client experiences.

About Client Experience Delivery

The Client Experience Delivery (CED) team, a specialized sub-team within the Executive Accelerators (XA), works with the role-based CXO Programs to support Next Generation CXO Event development, operations and execution. On behalf of the CED leadership, the Academies leader will oversee the production support, logistics and event execution for event programs and also drive innovation, process improvement, and leading practices with a focus on delivering consistent, high-quality client experience for all event programs.

CED team plays an integral role to support Lead Client Service Partners (LCSP) and account teams in helping key client leaders, their teams, and organizations address their most pressing challenges.

About The Role

As an Analyst, you will provide support to these role-based programs within XA under Growth and Purpose, Client Relationship Development, serving as a critical member of the delivery team for multiple events and work in liaison with Event Coordinator Leads in U.S.


Develop confidential C-Suite event deliverables utilizing MS PowerPoint, MS Excel, MS Word, and various internal and external search tools and databases.
Develop client-facing, print-ready materials and/or review automated outputs of deliverables with minimal guidance and work with tight deadlines and agreed SLAs
Be client- and quality-centric with attention to detail, tailoring outputs to each program's needs and be responsible for self-review of work items.
Build relationships with key stakeholders, follow up on work items, and provide regular progress updates to the event lead and other stakeholders.
Perform secondary research to prepare executive and company profiles.
Work effectively and in collaboration with all team members, actively developing knowledge and sharing best practices to achieve common team goals.
Utilize Salesforce, SharePoint, MS Teams, and other firm resources to provide operational support and manage event folders/files, ensuring proper upload to the respective program repositories.


Support client and internal communications and registration:


Manage Salesforce requests: validate data and customize extracts for leadership reports.
Draft, edit, and send event email invitations for participants, hosts, and staff; coordinate with Salesforce team as needed.
Populate participant templates, support team and program manager calls, and send touchpoint materials ahead of calls.
Handle curriculum submissions, create and submit Continuing Professional Education (CPE) sign-in sheets and documents, and distribute participant certificates.


Salesforce Database Management & Reporting


Create and maintain events, roles, and role extensions for all CXO events; Update and maintain client nomination, onboarding, and registrations on Salesforce.
Provide required operational support utilizing Qualtrics (Deloitte’s preferred survey tool), Salesforce, SharePoint, and other firm resources.
Build Salesforce reports for US counterparts, including the Program Team and US onsite coordinators.


Create and edit onsite materials and update trackers


Monitor Event Coordinator mailbox for requests.
Coordinate and track document submissions for print or digital use.
Collect, format, edit, and proofread participant bios; upload all event app info (names, bios, photos) and manage updates.
Review and verify accuracy of attendee, host, staff, speaker, and leadership lists.
Populate breakout tracker and assign participants to sessions based on client selections.
Review travel manifest and confirm transportation updates.
Collaborate with ServiceNow team to process and track invoices.


Required Skills


Advanced skills in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint): data cleansing, analysis, and template management.
Experience with Salesforce, Teams, and SharePoint.
Proficient in secondary research (e.g., sourcing executive bios from LinkedIn and company websites).
Basic editing and proofreading abilities.
Multitasking ability to manage multiple projects accurately and on time, with clear stakeholder communication.
Self-motivated team player who works independently, with a client-focused, detail-oriented approach.


Preferred Skills


Event management experience is a plus
Knowledge of managing finance applications and processing invoices is an advantage.
Appreciation for working in a consultative, team-oriented environment.


Professional qualifications, work location, and timings

Academic qualification: MBA or equivalent

1-3 years of relevant experience

Location: Hyderabad

Work Timings: 2:00 pm-11:00 pm IST

Work format: Hybrid (between work from office & home)

How You Will Grow

At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help sharpen skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career.

Benefits

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you .

Deloitte’s culture

Our positive and supportive culture encourages our people to do their best work every day. We celebrate individuals by recognizing their uniqueness and offering them the flexibility to make daily choices that can help them to be healthy, centered, confident, and aware. We offer well-being programs and are continuously looking for new ways to maintain a culture where our people excel and lead healthy, happy lives. Learn more about Life at Deloitte .

Corporate citizenship

Deloitte is led by a purpose: to make an impact that matters. This purpose defines who we are and extends to relationships with our clients, our people, and our communities. We believe that business has the power to inspire and transform. We focus on education, giving, skill-based volunteerism, and leadership to help drive positive social impact in our communities. Learn more about Deloitte’s impact on the world .

#XA_G&P

Our purpose

Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

Our people and culture

Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.

Professional development

At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .

Benefits To Help You Thrive

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

Recruiting tips

From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
